name: trackman-golf
description: Your Trackman Golf stats as MCP tools — handicap, rounds, practice, shot data, club gapping.
long_description: Connects to Trackman Golf with your own account and exposes your stats — course rounds, practice sessions, shot-level launch-monitor data, club gapping, and handicap — as MCP tools, so Claude can analyze your game and coach you. Runs locally; your data and token never leave your machine. Requires a Trackman account.

trackman_token.title: Trackman token (optional)
trackman_token.description: Paste a Bearer token from an authenticated Trackman portal session. Leave blank if you've run `trackman-mcp login` in a terminal — the server then uses the cached token automatically. See the project README for both options.
